name: Status Report
description: One command prints a clean snapshot of temps, position, homing state, and speed factor to the console.
long_description: Adds a `STATUS_REPORT` command that prints hotend and bed temperatures with targets, toolhead position, which axes are homed, current speed and flow factors, and print state — all in one tidy console block. Zero motion, zero heat: a safe first install to verify your Skillbility setup works.
